issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as missing pages or broken links.
The skill references a Claude-specific file path, limiting compatibility with other AI platforms.

scenarios.name: SaaS homepage audit converting at 1.2%
scenarios.rationale: Treatment walks the 7-dimension framework in impact order (value proposition first, friction last), gives outcome-focused headline rewrites, repositions a value-laden CTA above the fold, and outputs Quick Wins / High-Impact / Test Ideas sections; baseline gave generic CRO advice without prioritized framework or copy alternatives.

scenarios.name: Pricing page tier upgrade optimization
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies pricing-specific framework (recommended plan indication, decision anxiety), suggests Most Popular badge, reordered comparison leading with Pro differentiators, annual-default pricing, and a Pro-customer testimonial near pricing cards; baseline missed the pricing-specific frame and copy alternatives.
